guild.name: Wave Improvement Cord! | Loot & Surge Routes & Tips & Tricks

messages.content:
# **Advice From a Real Pro — Shxrk**

“As a competitive player, you win fights by **thinking one step ahead — not just by building fast or clicking hard. Stay calm under pressure, play smart angles, and always have a plan for your next move.” — Shxrk

- Never take a 50/50 fight
 - - If you’re both spraying and hoping for the best, you already lost.
 - - Always fight from right-hand peeks, from cover, or from height.

- Damage before you push
 - - Crack their shield first.
 - - Only then do you move in.
 - - Pros don’t push because they’re bored — they push because the enemy is weak.

- Box smart, not fast
 - - Anyone can build fast.
 - - The difference is knowing which wall matters.
 - - Take their wall, replace it, then control the box before you even think about shooting.

- Make them panic
 - - Pressure is a weapon.
 - - Spray their walls, change angles, fake edits — force mistakes.
 - - When players panic, they hand you the fight.

- Always have an exit plan
 - - Every fight I take, I already know how I’m leaving if it goes bad.
 - - If you don’t know your escape route, you’re gambling.

 - - Stop playing for highlights
 - - Start playing to dominate

# Advice From a Real Pro - Khanada
- *try to get damage advantage(to sneak on them or to tag them with AR)*
- *try to predict opponent what he will do/where he will go*
- *track opponents true a wall*
- *when you are low make enought space and wait for them to make mistake*
- *take walls with guns*
- *hold high in every fight*
- *do smarts peeks*
- *do side jumps and shoot*
